# TinyIMG

> Free, private image compression tool that runs entirely in your browser.

TinyIMG is a client-side image compression, conversion, and resizing tool. No images are uploaded to any server — all processing happens locally using Web Workers and OffscreenCanvas.

## Features

- Compress JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, and GIF images
- Convert between formats (JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF)
- Smart compression: automatically tests multiple quality levels and formats, picks the smallest result
- Bulk processing: up to 50 images at once
- Download individually or as a ZIP file
- 100% free, no sign-up, no watermarks

## Technical Details

- Built with Astro, React, and Tailwind CSS
- Uses Web Workers for off-main-thread processing
- Uses OffscreenCanvas and convertToBlob() for compression
- Static site deployed on Cloudflare Pages
- Zero server-side processing

## Links

- Website: https://tinyimg.michaelit.dev
